py_libraries.ml.optimisation.BayesianTuner

Methods

__init__(*args[, fixe_hparams])

get_best_hyperparameters([num_trials])

Returns the best hyperparameters, as determined by the objective.

get_best_models([num_models])

Returns the best model(s), as determined by the tuner's objective.

get_state()

Returns the current state of this object.

get_trial_dir(trial_id)

load_model(trial)

Loads a Model from a given trial.

on_batch_begin(trial, model, batch, logs)

Called at the beginning of a batch.

on_batch_end(trial, model, batch[, logs])

Called at the end of a batch.

on_epoch_begin(trial, model, epoch[, logs])

Called at the beginning of an epoch.

on_epoch_end(trial, model, epoch[, logs])

Called at the end of an epoch.

on_search_begin()

Called at the beginning of the search method.

on_search_end()

Called at the end of the search method.

on_trial_begin(trial)

Called at the beginning of a trial.

on_trial_end(trial)

Called at the end of a trial.

pre_create_trial()

Called before self.oracle.create_trial and before on_trial_begin.

reload()

Reloads this object from its project directory.

results_summary([num_trials])

Display tuning results summary.

run_trial(trial, *args, **kwargs)

Evaluates a set of hyperparameter values.

save()

Saves this object to its project directory.

save_model(trial_id, model[, step])

Saves a Model for a given trial.

search(*fit_args, **fit_kwargs)

Performs a search for best hyperparameter configuations.

search_space_summary([extended])

Print search space summary.

set_state(state)

Sets the current state of this object.

Attributes

project_dir

remaining_trials

Returns the number of trials remaining.
